sharedStyle: Original bright family-feature-quality cinematic 3D animation for a Korean personal-finance short without copying any studio, franchise, film or known character. Unmistakably stylized rather than live action, with believable Korean adult proportions, eyes only subtly larger than real life, restrained catchlights, gentle facial asymmetry, tactile fabric and shaped hair. Use bright natural daylight, warm color bounce, open shadows and lived-in full-scale Korean homes, cafes, stores and work spaces.
sceneIntegrationContract: Generate the recurring character, room, props and lighting together as one authored shot with matched perspective, ambient color bounce, contact shadows, foot-floor grounding, hand-object grip and foreground occlusion; no cutout character, pasted-on subject, green-screen edge or composited look.
motionReadyContract: Stage a plausible middle moment of one small action with relaxed shoulders and restrained micro-acting. Preserve separable foreground, character and background depth for later camera parallax, plus clean local motion around the eyes, hands, one story prop, hair or fabric. Never use lunging, reaching toward the camera, superhero poses or exaggerated shock.
forbiddenVisualContract: No laboratory, vault, factory, machine room, black-metal architecture, industrial apparatus, miniature, dollhouse, showroom-perfect advertising set, catalog portrait, fantasy battle, readable text, logo or watermark.

characters.name: 하린
characters.label: 생활비와 소비
characters.role: 일상에서 결제 습관과 비교 소비를 알아차리는 생활형 주인공
characters.appearance: Korean woman in her early thirties, warm oval stylized face, clear dark-brown eyes, shoulder-length dark chestnut hair with a fixed soft side part and inward-curved ends, medium height and natural build
characters.wardrobe: soft coral cardigan over an ivory crew-neck top, straight deep-navy trousers and simple white sneakers; keep the same silhouette and color family in every appearance
characters.motionProfile: small gaze shifts between the compared choice and the real budget boundary, one relaxed wrist completing the decision, a gentle weight shift, and subtle movement in the cardigan hem and hair ends; never rush, lunge or reach toward the camera
candidateDirections: friendly everyday energy, softer facial geometry, airy morning light
more focused editorial confidence, cleaner silhouette, warm late-afternoon light
